diff --git a/game/character.py b/game/character.py
index 3a1f5c2..7d4e9b7 100644
--- a/game/character.py
+++ b/game/character.py
@@ -1,6 +1,38 @@
-class Character:
-    def __init__(self, name):
-        self.name = name
-        self.state = "idle"
-        self.position = (0, 0)
-        self.target = None
+from game.furniture import Furniture
+
+class Character:
+    def __init__(self, name):
+        self.name = name
+        self.state = "idle"  # idle, working, wandering
+        self.position = (0, 0)
+        self.target = None  # target furniture or position
+        self.current_furniture = None
+
+    def interact_with(self, furniture: Furniture):
+        """Interact with given furniture, changing state accordingly."""
+        if furniture is None:
+            self.stop_working()
+            return
+
+        if furniture.type in ["desk", "anvil", "bookshelf"]:
+            self.current_furniture = furniture
+            self.state = "working"
+            furniture.occupy(self)
+        else:
+            self.stop_working()
+
+    def stop_working(self):
+        if self.current_furniture:
+            self.current_furniture.vacate(self)
+        self.current_furniture = None
+        self.state = "idle"
+
+    def update(self):
+        """Update character behavior based on state."""
+        if self.state == "working":
+            # Working at workstation
+            if self.current_furniture:
+                self.current_furniture.workstation_trigger(self)
+            else:
+                self.state = "idle"
+        elif self.state == "idle":
+            # Idle triggers wandering
+            self.wander()
+        elif self.state == "wandering":
+            self.wander()
+
+    def wander(self):
+        # Placeholder wandering logic
+        self.state = "wandering"
+        # Move randomly or towards some goal (not implemented here)
diff --git a/game/furniture.py b/game/furniture.py
index 9b7c3d8..d3f2a1b 100644
--- a/game/furniture.py
+++ b/game/furniture.py
@@ -1,6 +1,38 @@
-class Furniture:
-    def __init__(self, type):
-        self.type = type
-        self.occupied_by = None
+class Furniture:
+    def __init__(self, type):
+        self.type = type  # e.g. desk, anvil, bookshelf
+        self.occupied_by = None
+
+    def occupy(self, character):
+        """Mark furniture as occupied by character."""
+        if self.occupied_by is None:
+            self.occupied_by = character
+            # Additional logic for occupation can be added here
+
+    def vacate(self, character):
+        """Vacate furniture if occupied by character."""
+        if self.occupied_by == character:
+            self.occupied_by = None
+
+    def workstation_trigger(self, character):
+        """Trigger workstation logic when character is working."""
+        # This method can be expanded to trigger workstation effects
+        # For now, just a placeholder to indicate working state
+        pass
+
+class Desk(Furniture):
+    def __init__(self):
+        super().__init__("desk")
+
+class Anvil(Furniture):
+    def __init__(self):
+        super().__init__("anvil")
+
+class Bookshelf(Furniture):
+    def __init__(self):
+        super().__init__("bookshelf")
